overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a Gryffindor student exploring a castle. The character ascends a spiral staircase, enters a circular dormitory with four-poster beds, explores the room, then descends to a balcony overlooking a bustling common room with other students and a ghostly figure.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone spiral staircase in castle tower

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved stone spiral staircase, following the path upward

entered.detail: wide stone steps winding upward in a tight spiral with worn edges
tall narrow arched window with bright daylight streaming through
large woven wall hanging depicting a castle scene with red border
dark wooden door with metal studs at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone spiral staircase within a castle tower. Gothic windows allow beams of natural light to illuminate the worn stone steps. A medieval tapestry hangs on the wall near the top, where a heavy wooden door marks the entrance to the next area.

events.description: character opens the heavy wooden door and enters the circular dormitory room

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular dormitory, examining the four-poster beds, trunks, and furnishings

entered.detail: ornate dark wooden canopy bed with red curtains and bedding
red and gold house banners suspended from the high ceiling
large stone hearth with dark metal stove in the center of the room
stacked luggage trunks with blue and brown finishes
large patterned circular rug covering the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious circular dormitory with a high vaulted ceiling. Multiple dark wood four-poster beds line the stone walls, each with house banners hanging above. The room features a central stone fireplace, scattered rugs, and luggage trunks. Bright light streams through tall windows as the character explores the space.

events.description: exits the dormitory and re-enters the stone spiral staircase
reaches bottom of stairs and enters the corridor with archways

agents.ego_description: descending the spiral staircase and walking through the stone corridor

entered.detail: stone archway leading to the corridor at the base of the stairs
ornate wooden screen door with geometric lattice pattern

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory and descends the spiral staircase back down. Upon reaching the bottom, they enter a stone corridor with Gothic archways, approaching an ornate wooden lattice door that leads to the balcony area.

events.description: character stops at balcony railing to look down into the common room below
translucent ghostly figure becomes visible near the wall as character walks past

agents.ego_description: standing on the balcony observing students in the common room below, then walking along the balcony past a ghostly figure

notable_agents.action: groups of students walking and gathering in the common room below near the fireplace
translucent ghostly figure in period clothing standing near the stone wall

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade overlooking the common room below
large open common room with wooden beams, chandeliers, and students visible below
large vertical banners hanging from the common room ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the lattice door onto a balcony overlooking a grand common room filled with students. Leaning on the stone railing, they observe the activity below among the wooden beams and hanging banners. As they walk along the balcony, a translucent ghostly figure appears near the wall, and the character continues past framed paintings and ornate furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a secluded stone tower into a private dormitory before descending to a bustling social hub. It begins by climbing a narrow spiral staircase where beams of natural light pierce through Gothic windows, passing a medieval tapestry before entering through a heavy wooden door. The scene then opens into a spacious circular dormitory characterized by high vaulted ceilings, dark wood four-poster beds, and a central stone fireplace. As the character exits the room, the camera descends the spiral stairs once more and moves through a corridor of Gothic archways toward an ornate lattice door. Finally, the view expands onto a balcony overlooking a grand common room filled with students, where the camera glides past a translucent ghostly figure and framed paintings along the stone railing.
